Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************************

  Constructing a λ-theory from an algebra for the pure λ-calculus

  Given a Λ-algebra A (an algebra for the pure λ-calculus), one can construct a λ-theory. This file
  formalizes this construction. For the construction, we first take the set A1 of 1-functional
  elements: the elements f that are equal to λ x, f x, so the elements that have η-equality at least
  once. Function composition gives this set a monoid structure. We then consider the category of
  sets with a right action from this monoid. Of course, the monoid A1 itself can be considered as an
  object in this category. We obtain the λ-theory as the endomorphism theory of this object A1.
  To construct the endomorphism theory, we need A1 to be a reflexive object: we need A1^A1 to be a
  retract of A1 itself. We obtain this by noticing that the exponential object A1^A1 is isomorphic
  to A2 (the set of 2-functional elements), and that A2 is a retract of A1 (with the retraction
  given by precomposing elements with λ x y, x y).

  Contents
  1. The construction of the monoid [lambda_algebra_monoid]
  2. The construction of the λ-theory with β-equality
    [lambda_algebra_theory] [lambda_algebra_theory_has_beta]

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Tuples.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Vectors.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Algebras.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Examples.EndomorphismTheory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Examples.LambdaCalculus.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.FundamentalTheorem.CommonUtilities.MonoidActions.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheoryCategory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.CategoryOfRetracts.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope vec.
Local Open Scope algebraic_theories.
Local Open Scope lambda_calculus.
Local Open Scope stn.

(** * 1. The construction of the monoid *)

Section AlgebraToTheory.

  Context (L : lambda_theory).
  Context (Lβ : has_β L).
  Context (A : algebra L).

  Let maction {M : monoid} {X : monoid_action M}
    : (∏ x m, MonoidActions.action_ax M X x m)
    := MonoidActions.action.
  Let aaction {n : nat}
    : (∏ f a, AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a)
    := Algebras.action (n := n).

  Definition compose
    (a b : A)
    : A
    := aaction (compose (var (● 0 : stn 2)) (var (● 1 : stn 2))) (weqvecfun _ [(a ; b)]).

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
compose a (compose b c) = compose (compose a b) c

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
compose a (compose b c) = compose (compose a b) c

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(a;
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       (weqvecfun 2 [(b; c)]))]) =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         (weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]); c)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(a;
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       (weqvecfun 2 [(b; c)]))]) =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         (weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]); c)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Hv:= λ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧, ! var_action A (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) v: ∏ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧,
v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(a;
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       (weqvecfun 2 [(b; c)]))]) =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         (weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]); c)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A

         (weqvecfun 2
            [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0)) v; b)]);
     c)])

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

a, b, c: A

          Algebras.action (var (stnpr 2)) v)]))]) =

         (weqvecfun 2
            [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0)) v;
            Algebras.action (var (stnpr 1)) v)]);
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 2)) v)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A

v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
Algebras.action
  ((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
   • weqvecfun 2
       [(var (stnpr 0);
       (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])])
  v =
Algebras.action
  ((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
   • weqvecfun 2
       [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         • weqvecfun 2
             [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
       var (stnpr 2))]) v

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A

v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
(var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
• weqvecfun 2
    [(var (stnpr 0);
    (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
    • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])] =
(var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
• weqvecfun 2
    [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
      • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
    var (stnpr 2))]

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Hv:= λ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧, ! var_action A (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) v: ∏ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧,
v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
var (stnpr 0)
• weqvecfun 2
    [(var (stnpr 0);
    var (stnpr 0)
    • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
    ∘ var (stnpr 1)
      • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])]
∘ var (stnpr 1)
  • weqvecfun 2
      [(var (stnpr 0);
      var (stnpr 0)
      • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
      ∘ var (stnpr 1)
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])] =
var (stnpr 0)
• weqvecfun 2
    [(var (stnpr 0)
      • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
      ∘ var (stnpr 1)
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
    var (stnpr 2))]
∘ var (stnpr 1)
  • weqvecfun 2
      [(var (stnpr 0)
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
        ∘ var (stnpr 1)
          • weqvecfun 2
              [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
      var (stnpr 2))]

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Hv:= λ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧, ! var_action A (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) v: ∏ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧,
v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
weqvecfun 2
  [(var (stnpr 0);
  weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
    (stnpr 0)
  ∘ weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
      (stnpr 1))] (stnpr 0)
∘ weqvecfun 2
    [(var (stnpr 0);
    weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
      (stnpr 0)
    ∘ weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
        (stnpr 1))] (stnpr 1) =
weqvecfun 2
  [(weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
      (stnpr 0)
    ∘ weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
        (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))] (stnpr 0)
∘ weqvecfun 2
    [(weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
        (stnpr 0)
      ∘ weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
          (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))] (stnpr 1)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b, c: A
v:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Hv:= λ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧, ! var_action A (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) v: ∏ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧,
v (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧) =
Algebras.action (var (i : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) v
has_β L

    exact Lβ.
  Qed.

  Definition I1
    : A
    := aaction (U_term L) (weqvecfun _ vnil).

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
compose I1 I1 = I1

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
compose I1 I1 = I1

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]))]) =
Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (λ i : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
   Algebras.action
     (weqvecfun 2 [(U_term L; U_term L)] i)
     (weqvecfun 0 [()])) =
Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

Algebras.action
  ((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
   • weqvecfun 2 [(U_term L; U_term L)])
  (weqvecfun 0 [()]) =
Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()])

Lβ: has_β L

(var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
• weqvecfun 2 [(U_term L; U_term L)] = U_term L

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

U_term L

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a

∘ weqvecfun 2 [(U_term L; U_term L)] (stnpr 1) =
U_term L

    apply (U_compose _ Lβ).
  Qed.

  Definition make_functional_1 (a : A)
    : A
    := compose I1 a.

  Definition is_functional_1 (a: A)
    : UU
    := a = make_functional_1 a.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaprop (is_functional_1 a)

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaprop (is_functional_1 a)

    apply setproperty.
  Qed.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
is_functional_1 (aaction ((λ'n, f) : L n : hSet) v)

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
is_functional_1 (aaction ((λ'n, f) : L n : hSet) v)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, f) v =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     Algebras.action (λ'n, f) v)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, f) v =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (lift_constant n (U_term L)) v;
     Algebras.action (λ'n, f) v)])

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, f) v =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (λ i : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
   Algebras.action
     (weqvecfun 2
        [(lift_constant n (U_term L); (λ'n, f))] i) v)

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
(λ'n, f) =
weqvecfun 2 [(lift_constant n (U_term L); (λ'n, f))]
  (stnpr 0)
∘ weqvecfun 2 [(lift_constant n (U_term L); (λ'n, f))]
    (stnpr 1)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

n: ℕ
f: L (S n) : hSet
v: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
(λ'n, f) =
U_term L
∘ weqvecfun 2 [(lift_constant n (U_term L); (λ'n, f))]
    (stnpr 1)

    apply (!U_compose L Lβ _).
  Qed.

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaset (is_functional_1 a)

    abstract exact (isasetaprop (isaprop_is_functional_1 _)).
  Defined.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_1_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
a = a'

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_1_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
isPredicate
  (λ x : A,
   is_functional_1 x,, functional_1_set_subproof x)
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

a, a': functional_1_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_1_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
x: A
isaprop
  (is_functional_1 x,, functional_1_set_subproof x)

      apply isaprop_is_functional_1.
    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_1_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
pr1 a = pr1 a'

    exact H.
  Qed.

  Section Monoid.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
is_functional_1 (compose a b)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
is_functional_1 (compose a b)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
compose a b = make_functional_1 (compose a b)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
compose a b = compose I1 (compose a b)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
compose a b =
compose (aaction (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]))
  (compose a b)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]) =
aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(aaction (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       (weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]))])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
v:= weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A
aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1)) v =
aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(aaction (U_term L) (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1)) v)])

v:= weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A

  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (lift_constant 2 (U_term L)) v;
     aaction (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1)) v)])

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

v:= weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A

var (stnpr 0)
• weqvecfun 2
    [(lift_constant 2 (U_term L);
    var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))]

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
v:= weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A
var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1) =
weqvecfun 2
  [(lift_constant 2 (U_term L);
  var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))] (stnpr 0)
∘ weqvecfun 2
    [(lift_constant 2 (U_term L);
    var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))] (stnpr 1)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, b: A
v:= weqvecfun 2 [(a; b)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A
var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1) =
U_term L
∘ weqvecfun 2
    [(lift_constant 2 (U_term L);
    var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))] (stnpr 1)

      exact (!U_compose _ Lβ _).
    Qed.

    Definition is_functional_1_I1
      : is_functional_1 I1
      := !I1_idempotent.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
compose a I1 = make_functional_1 a

  (inflate (var (stnpr 0)) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inr tt)))

      now rewrite extend_tuple_inr.

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
isunit
  (λ a b : ∑ y, is_functional_1 y,
   compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
   is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b))
  (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
isunit
  (λ a b : ∑ y, is_functional_1 y,
   compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
   is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b))
  (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: ∑ y, is_functional_1 y
pr1
  (compose (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)) (pr1 a),,
   is_functional_1_compose
     (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)) (pr1 a)) =
make_functional_1 (pr1 a)
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: ∑ y, is_functional_1 y
pr1
  (compose (pr1 a) (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)),,
   is_functional_1_compose 
     (pr1 a) (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1))) =
make_functional_1 (pr1 a)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: ∑ y, is_functional_1 y
pr1
  (compose (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)) (pr1 a),,
   is_functional_1_compose
     (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)) (pr1 a)) =
make_functional_1 (pr1 a)
 apply idpath.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: ∑ y, is_functional_1 y
pr1
  (compose (pr1 a) (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1)),,
   is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a)
     (pr1 (I1,, is_functional_1_I1))) =
make_functional_1 (pr1 a)
 apply is_runit_I1.
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
monoid

A: algebra L

(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

L: lambda_theory

A: algebra L

(λ x : magma_category,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         monoid_disp_cat)) x) 
  ?pr1

SET

 Core.ob_disp

SET
 exact functional_1_set.

 Core.ob_disp

A: algebra L

a, b: functional_1_set
functional_1_set

          exact (compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b) ,, is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b)).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
(λ x : magma_category,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         monoid_disp_cat)) x)
  (functional_1_set,,
   ((λ a b : functional_1_set,
     compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
     is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b))
    :
    (λ x : SET,
     Core.ob_disp
       (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
          (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
             magma_disp_cat)) x) functional_1_set))
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        semigroup_disp_cat))
  (functional_1_set,,
   (λ a b : functional_1_set,
    compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
    is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b)))
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        unital_magma_disp_cat))
  (functional_1_set,,
   (λ a b : functional_1_set,
    compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
    is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        semigroup_disp_cat))
  (functional_1_set,,
   (λ a b : functional_1_set,
    compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
    is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b)))
 abstract (
            intros a b c;
            apply functional_1_eq;
            apply (!compose_assoc _ _ _)
          ).
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        unital_magma_disp_cat))
  (functional_1_set,,
   (λ a b : functional_1_set,
    compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b),,
    is_functional_1_compose (pr1 a) (pr1 b)))
 exact (_ ,, is_unit_I1).
    Defined.

  End Monoid.

(** * 2. The construction of the λ-theory with β-equality *)

  Section Theory.

    Definition UU_term
      : L 0
      := exponential_term L (U_term L) (U_term L).

    Definition I2
      : A
      :=
      aaction UU_term (weqvecfun _ vnil).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
compose I2 I2 = I2

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
compose I2 I2 = I2

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()]))]) =
Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (λ i : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
   Algebras.action
     (weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)] i)
     (weqvecfun 0 [()])) =
Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
Algebras.action
  ((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
   • weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)])
  (weqvecfun 0 [()]) =
Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
(var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
• weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)] = UU_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
var (stnpr 0) • weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)]
∘ var (stnpr 1) • weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)] =
UU_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)] (stnpr 0)
∘ weqvecfun 2 [(UU_term; UU_term)] (stnpr 1) = UU_term

      exact (exponential_idempotent L Lβ (U L Lβ) (U L Lβ)).
    Qed.

    Definition make_functional_2 (a : A)
      : A
      := compose I2 a.

    Definition is_functional_2 (a: A)
      : UU
      := a = make_functional_2 a.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
is_functional_2
  (aaction ((λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) : L n : hSet) p)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
is_functional_2
  (aaction ((λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) : L n : hSet) p)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action UU_term (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
     Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p)])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (lift_constant n UU_term) p;
     Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p)])

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (λ i : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
   Algebras.action
     (weqvecfun 2
        [(lift_constant n UU_term; (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)))]
        i) p)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
Algebras.action (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) p =
Algebras.action
  ((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
   • weqvecfun 2
       [(lift_constant n UU_term; (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)))])
  p

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
(λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) =
(var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
• weqvecfun 2
    [(lift_constant n UU_term; (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)))]

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
n: ℕ
f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
(λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) =
var (stnpr 0)
• weqvecfun 2
    [(lift_constant n UU_term; (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)))]
∘ var (stnpr 1)
  • weqvecfun 2
      [(lift_constant n UU_term; (λ'n, (λ'S n, f)))]

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a

p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

f: L (S (S n)) : hSet
p: ⟦ n ⟧ → A
(λ'n, (λ'S n, f)) = (λ'n, (λ'S n, f) ∘ U_term L)

      exact (!maponpaths (λ x, (abs x)) (compose_U L Lβ _)).
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaprop (is_functional_2 a)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaprop (is_functional_2 a)

      apply setproperty.
    Qed.

Lβ: has_β L

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
isaset (is_functional_2 a)

      abstract exact (isasetaprop (isaprop_is_functional_2 _)).
    Defined.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_2_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
a = a'

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_2_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
a = a'

maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_2_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
isPredicate
  (λ x : A,
   make_hSet (is_functional_2 x)
     (functional_2_set_subproof x))

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a

H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
pr1 a = pr1 a'

A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

isaprop
  (make_hSet (is_functional_2 x)
     (functional_2_set_subproof x))

        apply isaprop_is_functional_2.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a, a': functional_2_set
H: pr1 a = pr1 a'
pr1 a = pr1 a'

      exact H.
    Qed.

    Definition compose_I1_I2
      : compose I1 I2 = I2
      := !is_functional_1_action_abs _ _.

A: algebra L

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: A
H: is_functional_2 a
compose I2 a = compose (compose I1 I2) a

      now rewrite compose_I1_I2.
    Qed.

        apply (maponpaths pr1

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
x: functional_2_monoid_action_data
m, m': lambda_algebra_monoid
pr1 (action x (m + m')%addmonoid) =
pr1 (action (action x m) m')

        exact (compose_assoc _ _ _).
    Qed.

    Definition functional_2_monoid_action
      : monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
      := make_monoid_action _ functional_2_is_monoid_action.

p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 d; a; b)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
L 3

      refine (uncurry (var (● 0 : stn 3)) ∘ pair_arrow (var (● 1 : stn 3)) (var (● 2 : stn 3))).
    Defined.

    Definition functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data
      (d : functional_2_monoid_action)
      : (BinProductObject _ (binproducts_monoid_action_cat lambda_algebra_monoid
          (monoid_monoid_action _)
          (monoid_monoid_action _)
        ) : monoid_action _)
        →
        (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
      := λ x, (
        functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data_term d (pr11 x) (pr12 x) ,,
        is_functional_1_action_abs _ _
      ).

d: functional_2_monoid_action
∏
(x : binproducts_monoid_action_cat
       lambda_algebra_monoid
       (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
       (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))
(m : lambda_algebra_monoid),
mor_action_ax
  (functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data d) x m

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

  lambda_algebra_monoid
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)

pr1
  (functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data d
     (action x m)) =

  (action
     (functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data d x)
     m)

   is_functional_1_action_abs

     (inflate

     var (stnweq (inr tt))))

p:= weqvecfun 4 [(pr1 m; pr1 d; pr11 x; pr12 x)]: ⟦ 4 ⟧ → A

  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3

         (stnpr 1)) =
uncurry
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2); var (stnpr 3))]
     (stnpr 0))
∘ (pair_arrow
     (weqvecfun 3
        [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2);
        var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 1))
     (weqvecfun 3
        [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2);
        var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 2))
   ∘ weqvecfun 2
       [((uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
          ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
         • weqvecfun 3
             [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2);
             var (stnpr 3))]; var (stnpr 0))]
       (stnpr 1))

      exact (!maponpaths (λ x, _ ∘ x) (pair_arrow_compose _ Lβ _ _ _)).
    Qed.

    Definition functional_2_to_exponential_object_morphism_data
      : functional_2_monoid_action →
        (exponential_object (monoid_monoid_action _) (monoid_monoid_action _))
      := λ d, make_monoid_action_morphism _ (functional_2_to_monoid_action_is_morphism d).

pr1

                 lambda_algebra_monoid)

        (inflate
           (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))

                    lambda_algebra_monoid)

                    lambda_algebra_monoid),

           a (pr11 x) (pr12 x),,

           (inflate (uncurry (var (stnpr 0)))
           (inflate
              (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1))
                 (var (stnpr 2)))
           var (stnweq (inr tt))))
           (weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 a; pr11 x; pr12 x)]))
        (functional_2_to_monoid_action_is_morphism a))

A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: functional_2_monoid_action
m: lambda_algebra_monoid
x: binproducts_monoid_action_cat
  lambda_algebra_monoid
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
p:= weqvecfun 4 [(pr1 a; pr1 m; pr11 x; pr12 x)]: ⟦ 4 ⟧ → A
(λ'4,
((inflate
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 0))
 (inflate
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 1))
 (inflate
    (weqvecfun 3
       [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         • weqvecfun 2
             [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
       var (stnpr 2); var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 1))
 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
(inflate
   (weqvecfun 3
      [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
      var (stnpr 2); var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 2))
var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
uncurry
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(var (stnpr 0);
     (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
     • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))];
     var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 0))
∘ pair_arrow
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
       (stnpr 0)
     ∘ var (stnpr 1)
       • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])
    (weqvecfun 3
       [(var (stnpr 0);
       (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))];
       var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 2))

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: functional_2_monoid_action
m: lambda_algebra_monoid
x: binproducts_monoid_action_cat
  lambda_algebra_monoid
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
p:= weqvecfun 4 [(pr1 a; pr1 m; pr11 x; pr12 x)]: ⟦ 4 ⟧ → A
(λ'4,
((inflate
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 0))
 (inflate
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 1))
 (inflate
    (weqvecfun 3
       [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
         • weqvecfun 2
             [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
       var (stnpr 2); var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 1))
 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
(inflate
   (weqvecfun 3
      [((var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))];
      var (stnpr 2); var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 2))
var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
(λ'4,
((inflate
    (weqvecfun 3
       [(var (stnpr 0);
       (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
       • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))];
       var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 0))
 (inflate
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
       (stnpr 0))
  ∘ inflate
      (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
         (stnpr 1)) var (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate
   (weqvecfun 3
      [(var (stnpr 0);
      (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
      • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))];
      var (stnpr 3))] (stnpr 2))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

      exact (!maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app (app _ x) _))) (app_compose _ Lβ _ _ _)).
    Qed.

    Definition term_2
      (a a' : A)
      := (aaction (pair_arrow (var (● 0 : stn 2)) (var (● 1 : stn 2))) (weqvecfun _ [(a ; a')]) ,, is_functional_1_action_abs _ _).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data_term
  (aaction (curry (var (● 0 : ⟦ 1 ⟧)))
     (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]),,
   is_functional_2_action_abs
     (inflate (inflate (var (● 0 : ⟦ 1 ⟧)))
     ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
     var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩) (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]))
  a a' = pr1 (maction b (term_2 a a'))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data_term
  (aaction (curry (var (● 0 : ⟦ 1 ⟧)))
     (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]),,
   is_functional_2_action_abs
     (inflate (inflate (var (● 0 : ⟦ 1 ⟧)))
     ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
     var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩) (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]))
  a a' = pr1 (maction b (term_2 a a'))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
aaction
  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(pr1
         (aaction (curry (var (stnpr 0)))
            (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]),,
          is_functional_2_action_abs
            (inflate (inflate (var (stnpr 0)))
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)
            (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)])); a; a')]) =
pr1 (maction b (term_2 a a'))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
aaction
  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(aaction (curry (var (stnpr 0)))
         (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]); a; a')]) =
compose (pr1 b)
  (aaction
     (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 0)) (var (stnpr 1)))
     (weqvecfun 2 [(a; a')]))

a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
aaction
  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),

b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Algebras.action
  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(Algebras.action (curry (var (stnpr 0)))
         (weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 b)]); a; a')]) =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(pr1 b;
     Algebras.action
       (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 0)) (var (stnpr 1)))
       (weqvecfun 2 [(a; a')]))])

  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3

         (weqvecfun 1

       (weqvecfun 2 [(a; a')]))])

(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
Algebras.action
  (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
   ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
  (weqvecfun 3
     [(Algebras.action
         (curry (var (stnpr 0))
          • weqvecfun 1 [(var (stnpr 0))]) p;
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 1)) p;
     Algebras.action (var (stnpr 2)) p)]) =
Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
  (weqvecfun 2
     [(Algebras.action (var (stnpr 0)) p;
     Algebras.action
       (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 0)) (var (stnpr 1))
        • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])
       p)])

maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
(λ'3,
⟨ (extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1)))))
  var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))))
extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩) =
var (stnpr 1)
• weqvecfun 2
    [(var (stnpr 0);
    pair_arrow (var (stnpr 0)) (var (stnpr 1))
    • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))])]

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M)

b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
(λ'3,
⟨ (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1))) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))))
var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩) =

  (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
(λ'3,
⟨ (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1))) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))))
var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩) =
(λ'3,
⟨ (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1))) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(inflate
   (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 1); var (stnpr 2))]
      (stnpr 1)) var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩)

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

b: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
a, a': A
p:= weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 b; a; a')]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → A
(λ'3,
⟨ (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1))) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))))

(var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2))) var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩)

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (⟨_, (app x _)⟩))) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _)).
    Qed.

A: algebra L

a: functional_2_monoid_action
p:= weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 a)]: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → A
pr1
  ((functional_2_to_exponential_object_morphism_data
    · (λ x : exponential_object
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid)
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid),
       exponential_object_to_functional_2_term x,,
       is_functional_2_action_abs
         (inflate (inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
         ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
         var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)
         (weqvecfun 1
            [(pr1
                ((pr11 x)
                   ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                     is_functional_1_action_abs
                       (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                       (λ'1 + 0,
                       (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
                       var (stnweq ...))))
                       (weqvecfun 0 [()])),,
                    aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                    is_functional_1_action_abs
                      (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                      (λ'1 + 0,
                      (λ'S (1 + 0),
                      var (stnweq (...)))))
                      (weqvecfun 0 [()]))))]))) a) =
pr1 (identity functional_2_monoid_action a)

Lβ: has_β L

    · (λ x : exponential_object

                  lambda_algebra_monoid),

                      (λ'1 + 0,

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L

p:= weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 a)]: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → A
pr1
  (((λ d : functional_2_monoid_action,
     make_monoid_action_morphism
       (λ x : binproducts_monoid_action_cat
                lambda_algebra_monoid
                (monoid_monoid_action
                   lambda_algebra_monoid)
                (monoid_monoid_action
                   lambda_algebra_monoid),
        functional_2_to_monoid_action_morphism_data_term
          d (pr11 x) (pr12 x),,
        is_functional_1_action_abs
          (inflate (uncurry (var (stnpr 0)))
          (inflate
             (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1))
                (var (stnpr 2)))
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))
          (weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 d; pr11 x; pr12 x)]))
       (functional_2_to_monoid_action_is_morphism d))
    · (λ x : exponential_object
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid)
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid),
       exponential_object_to_functional_2_term x,,

         ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
         var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)
         (weqvecfun 1
            [(pr1
                ((pr11 x)
                   ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                     is_functional_1_action_abs
                       (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                       (λ'1 + 0,
                       (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
                       var (stnweq ...))))

                      (λ'1 + 0,

                      (weqvecfun 0 [()]))))]))) a) =

p:= weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 a)]: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → A

     make_monoid_action_morphism

                (var (stnpr 2)))
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))

    · (λ x : exponential_object

                  lambda_algebra_monoid)

         (weqvecfun 1
            [(pr1
                ((pr11 x)
                   ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                     is_functional_1_action_abs
                       (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                       (λ'1 + 0,
                       (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
                       var (stnweq ...))))
                       (weqvecfun 0 [()])),,
                    aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                    is_functional_1_action_abs
                      (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                      (λ'1 + 0,
                      (λ'S (1 + 0),
                      var (stnweq (...)))))
                      (weqvecfun 0 [()]))))]))) a) =
pr1 (identity functional_2_monoid_action a)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: functional_2_monoid_action
p:= weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 a)]: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → A
pr1
  (((λ d : functional_2_monoid_action,
     make_monoid_action_morphism
       (λ x : binproducts_monoid_action_cat
                lambda_algebra_monoid
                (monoid_monoid_action
                   lambda_algebra_monoid)
                (monoid_monoid_action
                   lambda_algebra_monoid),
        aaction
          (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
           ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1))
               (var (stnpr 2)))
          (weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 d; pr11 x; pr12 x)]),,
        is_functional_1_action_abs
          (inflate (uncurry (var (stnpr 0)))
          (inflate
             (pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1))
                (var (stnpr 2)))
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))
          (weqvecfun 3 [(pr1 d; pr11 x; pr12 x)]))
       (functional_2_to_monoid_action_is_morphism d))
    · (λ x : exponential_object
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid)
               (monoid_monoid_action
                  lambda_algebra_monoid),
       aaction (curry (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
         (weqvecfun 1
            [(pr1
                ((pr11 x)
                   ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                     is_functional_1_action_abs
                       (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                       (λ'1 + 0,
                       (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
                       var (stnweq ...))))
                       (weqvecfun 0 [()])),,
                    aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                    is_functional_1_action_abs
                      (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                      (λ'1 + 0,
                      (λ'S (1 + 0),
                      var (stnweq (...)))))
                      (weqvecfun 0 [()]))))]),,
       is_functional_2_action_abs
         (inflate (inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
         ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
         var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)
         (weqvecfun 1
            [(pr1
                ((pr11 x)
                   ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                     is_functional_1_action_abs
                       (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                       (λ'1 + 0,
                       (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
                       var (stnweq ...))))
                       (weqvecfun 0 [()])),,
                    aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
                    is_functional_1_action_abs
                      (var (stnweq (inr tt))
                      (λ'1 + 0,
                      (λ'S (1 + 0),
                      var (stnweq (...)))))
                      (weqvecfun 0 [()]))))]))) a) =
pr1 (identity functional_2_monoid_action a)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m

AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: functional_2_monoid_action
p:= weqvecfun 1 [(pr1 a)]: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → A
aaction (curry (var lastelement))
  (weqvecfun 1
     [(aaction
         (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
          ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
         (weqvecfun 3
            [(pr1 a; aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
            aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]))]))]) =
pr1 a

          ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))

Lβ: has_β L

  (weqvecfun 1
     [(Algebras.action
         (uncurry (var (stnpr 0))
          ∘ pair_arrow (var (stnpr 1)) (var (stnpr 2)))
         (weqvecfun 3
            [(Algebras.action
                (var (stnpr 0) ∘ var (stnpr 1))
                (weqvecfun 2
                   [(Algebras.action UU_term
                       (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
                   Algebras.action (π0) p)]);
            Algebras.action π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]);
            Algebras.action π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]))]))]) =

  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
a: binproducts_monoid_action_cat
  lambda_algebra_monoid
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
pr1
  (maction
     ((pr11 f)
        ((aaction π1 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
          is_functional_1_action_abs
            (var (stnweq (inr tt))
            (λ'1 + 0,
            (λ'1 + (1 + 0),
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))))
            (weqvecfun 0 [()])),,
         aaction π2 (weqvecfun 0 [()]),,
         is_functional_1_action_abs
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))
           (λ'1 + 0,
           (λ'S (1 + 0), var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
           (weqvecfun 0 [()])))
     (term_2 (pr11 a) (pr12 a))) =
pr1
  (identity
     (exponential_object
        (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
        (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))
     f a)

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
f: exponential_object
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
a: binproducts_monoid_action_cat
  lambda_algebra_monoid
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
p:= weqvecfun 2 [(pr11 a; pr12 a)]: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → A
weqvecfun 2
  [(lift_constant 2 π1;
  pair_arrow (var (stnpr 0)) (var (stnpr 1))
  • weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))])]
  (stnpr 0)
∘ pair_arrow
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 0))
    (weqvecfun 2 [(var (stnpr 0); var (stnpr 1))]
       (stnpr 1)) =
(λ'2,
(inflate
   (weqvecfun 2
      [(lift_constant 2 (U_term L); var (stnpr 0))]
      (stnpr 1)) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
functional_2_monoid_action

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
a: monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid
make_hSet (is_functional_2 (compose I2 (pr1 a)))
  (functional_2_set_subproof (compose I2 (pr1 a)))

        abstract exact (
          !maponpaths (λ x, compose x _) (I2_idempotent) @
          !compose_assoc _ _ _
        ).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
∏ (x : monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)
(m : lambda_algebra_monoid),
mor_action_ax
  (λ a : monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid,
   compose I2 (pr1 a),, functional_app_subproof a) x m
 abstract (
          intros a m;
          apply functional_2_eq;
          exact (compose_assoc _ _ _)
        ).
    Defined.

  (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid)

· (identity functional_2_monoid_action
   · universal_monoid_exponential_iso) =
identity
  (exp
     (is_exponentiable_monoid_action
        (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))
     (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A: algebra L
maction:= λ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M), action: ∏ (M : monoid) (X : monoid_action M) 
(x : X) (m : M), action_ax M X x m
aaction:= λ n : ℕ, Algebras.action: ∏ (n : ℕ) (f : L n) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → A),
AlgebraCategoryCore.action_ax L A n f a
X: (functional_abs
 :
 monoid_action_cat lambda_algebra_monoid
 ⟦ functional_2_monoid_action,
 monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid ⟧)
· functional_app =
identity functional_2_monoid_action
inv_from_z_iso universal_monoid_exponential_iso
· universal_monoid_exponential_iso =
identity
  (exp
     (is_exponentiable_monoid_action
        (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))
     (monoid_monoid_action lambda_algebra_monoid))

      apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
    Qed.

  End Theory.

End AlgebraToTheory.
